containerGlobalName.description: The key name of the app in the Okta Integration Network (OIN)

containerOrn.description:
The [ORN](/openapi/okta-management/guides/roles/#okta-resource-name-orn) of the relevant resource.

Use the specific app ORN format (`orn:{partition}:idp:{yourOrgId}:apps:{appType}:{appId}`) to identify an Okta app instance in your org.

created.description: Timestamp when the app service account was created

description.description: The description of the app service account

id.description: The UUID of the app service account

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the app service account was last updated

name.description: The user-defined name for the app service account

ownerGroupIds.description: A list of IDs of the Okta groups who own the app service account

ownerUserIds.description: A list of IDs of the Okta users who own the app service account

status.description: Describes the current status of a service account

statusDetail.description: Describes the detailed status of a service account

username.description: The username that serves as the direct link to your managed app account. Ensure that this value precisely matches the identifier of the target app account.
